title: Monday Docs: Mentions & Shortcuts Should Be Available for Use in the Mobile App (Not Just the Comments)
excerpt: Currently in the mobile app, there is no option to use @mentions or shortcuts like /Divider and /Today within a Monday document. (I do NOT mean using @mentions in the Comments on a monday doc.) In order to use these feat…

posts.author: sarahross1011 (Sarah R)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently in the mobile app, there is no option to use @mentions or shortcuts like /Divider and /Today within a Monday document. (I do NOT mean using @mentions in the Comments on a monday doc.) In order to use these features, you have to be using the desktop app or the web version, but I should be able to use this in the app as well. Please add these features to the mobile app!
